description_long: This adult pedestrian is dressed in a modern, tactical-inspired outfit suitable for urban environments. The individual wears a high-collared, loose black jacket that partially covers the lower face, paired with blue camouflage-patterned cargo pants. Accessories include a helmet with a visor and headphones, gloves with reinforced knuckles, and sturdy shoes, all coordinated with the outfit. The gloves and helmet suggest a focus on protection and possibly communication, while the pants feature multiple pockets and straps for utility. The overall appearance is that of a prepared, possibly tech-savvy urban dweller or security personnel. The figure's stance is upright and alert, with arms slightly extended and fingers pointing downward.
description: A modern adult in tactical urban attire, featuring a high-collared jacket, blue camo cargo pants, helmet with visor, gloves, and sturdy shoes. The outfit emphasizes protection, utility, and readiness.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high-collared jacket, helmet with visor, gloves, and full details of the blue camo pants and shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the helmet profile, jacket's volume, and the layered look of the pants and gloves.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the helmet, jacket, and pants, with visible straps and pocket details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the helmet, jacket, gloves, and the camo pants' side features.
attribute_clothing_type: tactical high-collared jacket, cargo pants, protective helmet with visor, reinforced gloves
